# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" == "" ]; then
        CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      fi
      git tag -a "release-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" -m "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      git push origin "release-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"

  only:
    - merge_requests

  allow_failure: false

  notifications:
    email:
      recipients:
        - dev@example.com
      on_success: always
      on_failure: always
      content_type: text/html
      message: |
        Merge Request: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
        Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION
        Commit Message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE
